title: × gastrolea beguinii var. perfectior
intro_study: According to the provided study, I couldn't find any information about × gastrolea beguinii var. perfectior, but since it is not mentioned in the study, I can only provide a general statement about the benefits of a related plant's extract (S. officinalis), as it has been shown that its aqueous extract (SAE) has benefic effects in the treatment of gastrointestinal physiological disorders, including reducing diarrhea and preserving the normal activities of antioxidants.
